title: neolacis pusilla
intro: Neolacis pusilla is a plant species commonly known as the "small lacis," a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Neolacis pusilla is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits in soothing inflammation and promoting overall well-being. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
